languages.text: "Мне жаль, что ксеносская ересь омрачила ваш разум. Вы не оставили нам выбора".

traits.locale_text: "Мне жаль, что ксеносская ересь омрачила ваш разум. Вы не оставили нам выбора".

languages.text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."
languages.original_text: "Мне жаль, что ксеносская ересь омрачила ваш разум. Вы не оставили нам выбора".

traits.locale_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."
"I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."
"I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

languages.text: “很遗憾，异形邪说已经蒙蔽了你的判断。你让我们别无选择。”
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: “很遗憾，异形邪说已经蒙蔽了你的判断。你让我们别无选择。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|désolé|désolée} que l'hérésie des xénos ait obscurci votre jugement. Vous ne nous avez pas laissé le choix. »
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|désolé|désolée} que l'hérésie des xénos ait obscurci votre jugement. Vous ne nous avez pas laissé le choix. »

languages.text: «Lamento que la herejía xenos nuble su buen juicio. No nos deja alternativa».
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: «Lamento que la herejía xenos nuble su buen juicio. No nos deja alternativa».

languages.text: "Zeno kâfirliğinin yargını bulandırmasına üzüldüm. Bize başka seçenek bırakmadın."
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno kâfirliğinin yargını bulandırmasına üzüldüm. Bize başka seçenek bırakmadın."

languages.text: "Es tut mir leid, dass die Ketzerei der Xenos Euer Urteilsvermögen trübt. Ihr lasst uns keine andere Chance."
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: "Es tut mir leid, dass die Ketzerei der Xenos Euer Urteilsvermögen trübt. Ihr lasst uns keine andere Chance."

languages.text: 「異端の影が君の判断を曇らせている。我々に選択肢を与えてはくれぬ」
languages.original_text: "I am sorry that the xenos heresy has clouded your judgement. You have left us no choice."

traits.locale_text: 「異端の影が君の判断を曇らせている。我々に選択肢を与えてはくれぬ」
